context: Tests whether the agent produces a complete ads creative brief for a new subscription box launch campaign, following the exact section structure and file path conventions specified in the skill. No brand vault is provided, so the brief relies on the information in the task description.

checklist.name: Output file path
checklist.description: Brief is written to briefs/petalbox-launch.md (or a path following the ~/.claude/brand-voice-vault/<brand>/briefs/<slug>.md pattern)

checklist.name: Title format
checklist.description: Document starts with '# Brief: ' followed by a campaign name

checklist.name: One-liner present
checklist.description: A One-liner section exists with a single sentence covering target audience, offer, and desired action

checklist.name: Objective — Primary KPI
checklist.description: Objective section contains a Primary KPI with a specific metric and numeric target (e.g., CPA < $45, subscriptions)

checklist.name: Objective — Secondary KPI
checklist.description: Objective section contains a Secondary KPI with a specific metric and threshold (e.g., CTR > X%, frequency capped at N)

checklist.name: Objective — Success threshold
checklist.description: Objective section includes a Success threshold that defines BOTH when to scale and when to kill the campaign

checklist.name: Audience — four subsections
checklist.description: Audience section has all four subsections: Primary, Secondary, Exclusions, and Estimated audience size

checklist.name: Funnel stage + brand-awareness context
checklist.description: Funnel stage section states Cold/Warm/Retargeting/Mixed AND includes a sentence about what the audience knows about the brand at this stage

checklist.name: Core message — three elements
checklist.description: Core message section contains all three elements: Promise, Reason to believe, and Call to action

checklist.name: Hook variants — count and type labels
checklist.description: Hook variants section has 3-5 hooks, each labeled with its type (Curiosity, Pain-point, Social proof, Promise/aspirational, or Contrarian)

checklist.name: Copy — 3 primary text versions
checklist.description: Copy variants section contains exactly 3 primary text versions

checklist.name: Asset specs — 3 image formats with pixels
checklist.description: Asset specs lists all three image formats with correct pixel dimensions: 1:1 (1080×1080), 9:16 (1080×1920), and 4:5 (1080×1350)

checklist.name: Approval gates — 4 checkboxes
checklist.description: Approval gates section contains exactly 4 unchecked checkbox items ([ ])
